hooks.command: npx eslint --fix --quiet $(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; npx prettier --write $(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null; exit 0

echo '=== Uncommitted Changes ===' && git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null; CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$CHANGED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: $CHANGED file(s) not committed! Run atomic-commit before stopping."; fi
